summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned. One security-sensitive PR is routed centrally, one contributor PR has a bounded repair path, and the remaining PRs are kept or escalated based on missing merge preflight, maintainer policy decisions, or failing checks.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent maintainer-review PR; do not recommend merge without complete merge preflight.
Route only #78436 to central OpenClaw security handling; continue unrelated non-security classifications.
Maintainer decision needed on the new Telegram network policy knob and changelog handling before repair or merge can be recommended.
Repair the useful contributor branch rather than replace or merge immediately; preserve @donbowman credit.
Create an executable repair artifact for #78554 while staying in plan mode.
Maintainer or executor decision needed for the failing check before merge can be recommended.

needs_human: #78438: maintainer decision on Telegram OPENCLAW_TELEGRAM_FORCE_IPV4 policy surface and release-owned changelog handling.
#87487: determine whether checks-node-auto-reply-reply-agent-runner FAILURE is unrelated/flaky, requires rerun, or blocks the PR.
